title: Mindless Human Interface Disruption
html:
Yahir's recurring 2024 startup thesis: replace "wasteful human interfaces" — parking-garage attendants, toll-booth collectors, security guards checking IDs, museum ticket sellers, retail greeters, stadium ticket checkers, gym front-desk verifiers, retail cashiers. Listed in 2024 05 13 things with star-ratings beside each (parking garage and toll booth get 4–5 stars). Lineage runs from these 2024 musings into the eventual Rankett / direction. Sibling concept to disconnected from outcome — the disruption thesis is the positive version of the disposition diagnostic.

TL;DR

  • 18 inbound citations — spans 2018 → 2026, with a peak in mid-2024.
  • The 2024 list (2024 05 13 things) is the canonical spec, but the disposition predates it by 6 years — see 2018 12 27 youtube for all the senses concept / 2019 03 02 is the human brain a finite memory holder like a hard drive.
  • Star-rated targets (4–5 stars): parking-garage attendants, toll-booth collectors. Lower stars: gym front-desk, retail greeters.
  • The thesis resolves into AEO/Rankett — the disconnected-from-outcome humans Rankett targets are agency-marketers running default schema. Same logic, different vertical.
  • Pairs with type effectiveness chart (categorizing markets by replaceability) and 10x thinking (sizing the opportunity).

The 2024 specific list (with stars)

From 2024 05 13 things:

  • ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Parking-garage attendants
  • ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Toll-booth collectors
  • ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Security guards checking IDs
  • ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Museum ticket sellers
  • ⭐⭐⭐ Retail greeters
  • ⭐⭐⭐ Stadium ticket checkers
  • ⭐⭐⭐ Gym front-desk verifiers
  • ⭐⭐⭐ Retail cashiers

Sibling ideas in the same note: asset tokenization, truck-driver ads, smart-home integration.

Far-back roots

  • 2018-12-27 — 2018 12 27 youtube for all the senses concept — earliest "let's replace this with software" instinct.
  • 2019-03-02 — 2019 03 02 is the human brain a finite memory holder like a hard drive — same disposition applied to memory.
  • 2019-08-06 — 2019 08 06 read books wireless charging brain waves — neural-interface fantasy.
  • 2020-05-02 — 2020 05 02 things with major upside — first systematic "where's the upside" inventory.
  • 2021-11-15 — 2021 11 15 numbers in investors pitch — the same logic translated into investor framing.
  • 2021-12-04 — 2021 12 04 capitalisms climate — the macro frame.
  • 2022-09-15 — 2022 09 15 mount rushmore bci / 2022 09 15 mount rushmore neuro comm — neuro-disruption.
  • 2022-10-11 — 2022 10 11 happiness dystopia — adjacent thesis.

How it resolved into Rankett

The thesis matured. By 2024 Yahir realized the highest-margin "mindless human interface" wasn't the toll booth — it was the agency-marketer who never updates schema. Same shape (a human doing what software should), but with paying customers willing to pay for the replacement. The 2026 Lift ATX strategy applies the same lens to gym-floor sales.
